You can hear all her discoveries live on 88Nine at 10 p.m. every Monday on · What’s All This: Adventures in New Music. For the past three-ish years, hemlocke springs (the project of North Carolina’s Isimeme Udu) has been sharing belovedly nerdy synth-pop songs on TikTok, which has ultimately led to more widespread recognition. Hemlocke Springs stands out with debut album - The Post After going viral on TikTok, she opened for famous artists like Doja Cat, Chapell Roan and Conan Gray. Seemingly continuing on her train of success, she released her debut album “the apple tree under the sea” on Friday. “The apple tree under the sea” is a self-produced, dramatic alt-pop album released by Springs with AWAL. The 10-track record explores themes of self-expression, discovery, religion and relationships. Each track is a new experience for the listener, as Springs incorporates different styles of music into her 80s synth-pop-inspired songs. hemlocke springs announces spring tour hemlocke also announced a headlining tour for the album, which surrounds her festival dates at Governors Ball and Bonnaroo, beginning on May 15 in Phoenix. There’s no new NYC date, but she plays Asbury Park, NJ’s The Stone Pony on June 10. Hemlocke Springs Tour 2026 Setlist, Dates, Venues & Presale Tickets A. She will perform on June 10, 2026 at The Stone Pony in Asbury Park, New Jersey.
